titleStmt.title: SII 41.294: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 294. (A.R. No. 510 of 1905.) Kannanūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Bhōjēśvara temple.

summary.p: Mutilated. Records that the king granted the village of Vaṅgāram in Pāchchil-kuṟuvaṭṭam as taxfree dēvadāna to the temple of Pōsalīsuramuḍaiya-Nāyanār at Kaṇṇanūr for celebrating a festival called Raṇamukharāman-[Sandhi] instituted in his name.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kaṇṇaṉūril Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum Uṭaiyār poyicalicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattarkkut taṅkaḷ nāyaṉārkku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa Iraṇamukarāmaṉ
tupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum Uṭalāka Inta nāyaṉār(ppu) tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa vaṭakarai Irājairāvaḷanāṭṭup pāccilkkūṟṟattup paṇamaṅkalattil muṉpilāṇṭukaḷum koyil pūcai
pātum mutal nīkki niṉṟa mutalile muṉṟāvatu Āṉimātam mutal Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku Āyirakkala nellu Amutupaṭikku Aṭuttu ṇākavum Iṉṉāṭṭuppāccilkkuṟuvaṭṭattu vaṅkāram nāṉku Ellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa naṉcey puṉce
kāṭumeṭu nikki nirnilaimaranilai Uḷḷiṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Innāḷ mutal tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyākak tantu Ivvūrkku varum poṉvarikāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai pañcupili cantuvikrahappeṟu tiruva
kam kiṟṟuvarikūṟṟilak(k)ai kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai niṟaiaccu Ilāñciṉaipeṟu Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti veṭṭi nirāṇi pācippāṭṭama kāverikkaraittevai Ūcivāci mātiricānti taṟiiṟai maṉaiyiṟaicekkiṟai taṭṭoli
Digital edition of SII 41.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
